title: Grimlin: Weaponry
description: An Armory of Weapons hand crafted by the Abyssal Empire
body:
This mod aims to give the player plenty of new Weapons to play around with. At the moment There are, Wakizashi's, Katana's, Longswords, Maces, Claymores, Scythes, and Spears.

Compatibilities
I built this mod with Better Combat, and Epic Fight in mind, so it should work with either, your choice on which one.

Incompatibilities
as far as I know, there are no Incompatibilities, but if you find any please let me know!
